About Me
Oliseh Ifeanyi
Print Graphic Designer · Brand Identity Specialist

I'm a print graphic designer and brand identity specialist with 4+ years of experience crafting visual assets for businesses across food & beverage, beauty, events, and professional services industries.

My work spans logo design, e-posters, flex banners, business cards, and full brand identity systems — all executed with precision in Adobe Illustrator.

Adobe IllustratorCorelDrawLogo DesignBrand IdentityPrint DesignE-PostersFlex & BannersSocial Media DesignAI Animation

What I Offer

Services & Expertise

01 /
Logo &
Brand Identity

From concept to complete brand systems — logos, colour palettes, typography, and usage guidelines. Every mark is purposeful, versatile, and built to last.

Logo DesignBrand GuidelinesIdentity Systems
02 /
E-Posters &
Social Media

Scroll-stopping digital posters and social media graphics for product launches, events, and promotions. Optimised for every platform.

E-PostersSocial TemplatesEvent Graphics
03 /
Flex Banners &
Print Collateral

Large-format flex banners, flyers, business cards, and print-ready artwork designed to proper bleed, resolution, and production specs.

Flex BannersFlyersBusiness Cards
04 /
Brand Mockups &
Visual Presentation

Photorealistic brand mockups across merchandise, packaging, and signage — giving clients a vivid preview of their brand in the real world.

Career

Work Experience

Jan 2022 — Present
Graphic Designer (Freelance)
Remote · Self-Employed
Logo design, brand identity, e-posters, flex banners, and business cards for clients across food & beverage, beauty, events, and professional services. Projects include Fluffy Treats by Lydia, Excellent Bukka, La'Posh Unisex & Spa, Hadehs Glam Makeovers, and many more.
Feb 2023 — Present
Quality Assurance & Control Analyst
Aristocrat Industries Limited · Sango Ota, Ogun State
Analyses materials and monitors print production for 100% conformity with client specifications. Conducts ink GSM testing, lamination assessment, and production quality checks.
Aug 2021 — Jan 2022
Graphic Designer
Goldmender Nigeria Limited · Akure, Ondo State
Conceptualised and executed brand designs in Adobe Illustrator. Collaborated with marketing and sales teams on branding materials. Managed print vendor relationships.
Jan 2021 — Aug 2021
Graphic Designer
Onside Nigeria · Remote
Designed social media content, infographics, and visual communication materials. Maintained consistent brand identity across all digital platforms.
